projects.tagline: Workforce management and time-tracking platform with GDPR-compliant digital signature.
projects.businessProblem: CAE clients managed companies, workers and time tracking with spreadsheets and manual processes — no centralized compliance or audit trail.
projects.solutionOverview: Joined an existing ASP.NET Core MVC platform and led the implementation of key features: a fully automated GDPR-compliant digital signature workflow for monthly time-sheet validation, REST API for mobile apps, and multi-tenant support for 3 business brands.
highlights: GDPR-compliant e-signature system with magic tokens (SHA-256), audit trail (IP, UserAgent, stroke count), async background job processing with retries, and PDF stamping via PdfSharpCore.
REST API for concurrent mobile time tracking with per-day operation limits, timezone-aware boundaries, and encrypted API keys per client.
Multi-tenant architecture serving 3 business brands with isolated databases, custom CSS themes, and independent communication channels (SMTP + WhatsApp).
PDF pipeline combining QuestPDF for structured reports, PdfSharpCore for signature stamping, and ChromeHtmlToPdf for HTML conversion.

impact.ops: Reduced manual data entry by 80% through CSV imports and centralized management.
impact.quality: Improved data consistency with validated templates and relationship enforcement.
impact.scalability: Template-driven approach supports adding new clients without code changes.

projects.callToAction: Available for a technical demo of the platform and discussion on modernization to .NET 10.

projects.tagline: HR SaaS platform with AI-powered document classification, digital signature, and real-time collaboration.
projects.businessProblem: Companies needed centralized HR document management with digital signatures and worker self-service — without managing local infrastructure or credentials.
projects.solutionOverview: Multi-tenant SaaS built with .NET 10, Blazor Web App, and PostgreSQL. Features AI-powered OCR document classification (PdfPig), three digital signature modes (OTP, simple, certificate), worker portal without accounts, SignalR real-time notifications, and subdomain-based tenant isolation.
highlights: AI-powered document classification with OCR (PdfPig) — automatically extracts data from HR documents and classifies them into lifecycle stages (Draft → Review → Validated → Expired).
3-mode digital signature: OTP via email, simple click-to-sign, and certificate-based with visual PDF positioning via QuestPDF — full audit trail for each.
PKI research and integration study with EJBCA / SignServer for enterprise-grade certificate-based signatures — currently evaluating integration into production workflows.
Clean Architecture (.NET 10, C# 14) with Blazor Web App (SSR + InteractiveServer), EF Core global query filters for multi-tenant data isolation, and RBAC with 6 roles.
Docker + Caddy on GCP, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Serilog structured logging with TenantId/CorrelationId enrichment.

impact.ops: 95% paper elimination, 80% time reduction in signature workflows, 100% document traceability.
impact.quality: AI classification reduces manual sorting, expiration alerts prevent compliance gaps.
impact.scalability: Multi-tenant architecture enables growth without infrastructure changes.

projects.callToAction: Schedule a demo to explore multi-tenant setup, AI document classification, digital signature workflows, and the worker portal.
